data.title: Baronsmead Second Venture Trust Extends Share Offer and Issues New Equity Ahead of Tax Relief Cut
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Baronsmead Second Venture ( (GB:BMD) ) has provided an announcement.

Baronsmead Second Venture Trust PLC has allotted 12,370,324 new ordinary shares under its ongoing offer for subscription, priced between 47.27p and 49.56p, with an average issue price of 48.01p, and will seek admission of these shares to trading on the London Stock Exchange around 8 April 2026. Following this issue, total ordinary shares rise to 495,704,729, giving 432,792,488 voting rights, while the board has extended the fundraising offer into the 2026/27 tax year with a final allotment expected on or around 14 May 2026, ahead of a planned reduction in VCT income tax relief from 30% to 20%.

More about Baronsmead Second Venture

Baronsmead Second Venture Trust PLC is a UK-listed venture capital trust that provides investors with exposure to a diversified portfolio of smaller, growth-oriented companies. The trust focuses on delivering tax-efficient returns to UK investors by investing in qualifying holdings under the Venture Capital Trust regime, with its shares traded on the London Stock Exchange’s main market.

Average Trading Volume: 842,527

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

data.description:

Ferretti S.p.A. ( (IT:YACHT) ) has shared an update.

Ferretti S.p.A. has issued an overseas regulatory announcement in Hong Kong to mirror the publication of a board report on Italy’s eMarket SDIR system, ensuring equal access to information for international investors. The document, approved by the board on 31 March 2026, relates to the first agenda item for the company’s ordinary shareholders’ meeting scheduled for 14 May 2026 and is available on its corporate website.

The Hong Kong posting is explicitly framed as a compliance step with local listing rules rather than a separate corporate action, underlining Ferretti’s effort to align disclosure practices across the Italian and Hong Kong markets. This approach reinforces transparency for cross-border shareholders and supports the company’s standing as a dual-market issuer subject to multiple regulatory regimes.

More about Ferretti S.p.A.

Ferretti S.p.A. is an Italy-incorporated joint-stock company with limited liability, listed in Hong Kong under stock code 09638. The company is governed by a board comprising executive, non-executive and independent non-executive directors, reflecting a standard corporate governance structure for an internationally listed issuer.

data.title: MasterCraft to Acquire Marine Products in Stock-and-Cash Merger
data.description:
New activity is brewing for Marine Products ( (MPX) ). The company has submitted a Form DEFM14A to the SEC, indicating an upcoming shareholder vote. This form gives shareholders all the information they need to develop an informed vote. Read on to learn more about the proposed company action.

End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

MasterCraft Boat Holdings has agreed to acquire Marine Products in a two-step merger in which Marine Products will become a wholly owned subsidiary of MasterCraft and then be merged into a MasterCraft subsidiary. Marine Products shareholders will receive 0.232 shares of MasterCraft stock plus $2.43 in cash per Marine Products share, leaving them with about 33.4% of the combined company, while MasterCraft shareholders will retain 66.6%.

Both companies’ boards, along with a special committee of independent Marine Products directors, have unanimously approved the deal and are urging investors to back it at virtual special meetings on May 12, 2026. The transaction is effectively assured Marine Products shareholder approval due to a voting agreement covering about 69.1% of its voting power, but still requires a majority vote from MasterCraft shareholders to proceed.

The most recent analyst rating on (MPX) stock is a Buy with a $8.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Marine Products stock, see the MPX Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on MPX Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, MPX is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by strong financial resilience (near zero debt, solid equity base, and positive free cash flow), supported by favorable corporate-event momentum from the announced acquisition. These positives are tempered by weak technical trend signals (below key moving averages with low RSI) and a relatively high P/E, partially offset by a high dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on MPX stock, click here.

More about Marine Products

Marine Products Corporation is a manufacturer in the recreational boating industry, producing fiberglass motorized pleasure boats for the consumer market. Its products are sold primarily in the U.S. through a network of dealers, and its shares trade on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker MPX.

Average Trading Volume: 44,094

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $254.1M

data.title: Elite launches generic methadone tablets, expanding pain portfolio
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Elite Pharmaceuticals ( (ELTP) ) has shared an update.

On April 2, 2026, Elite Pharmaceuticals announced it has commercially launched its generic methadone hydrochloride 5 mg and 10 mg tablets in the United States under the Elite Laboratories, Inc. label. The tablets, indicated for severe and persistent pain and for detoxification and maintenance treatment of opioid addiction alongside appropriate social and medical services, enter a market where combined brand and generic retail sales reached about $22 million in 2025, underscoring a modest but meaningful revenue opportunity for the company.

The launch strengthens Elite’s presence in the controlled-substance and pain-management segment of the generic pharmaceuticals market, aligning with its strategy of targeting niche products that require specialized handling and regulatory oversight. For stakeholders, the move suggests incremental top-line growth potential and deeper participation in opioid addiction treatment and chronic pain management markets, albeit in a competitive and tightly regulated therapeutic area.

The most recent analyst rating on (ELTP) stock is a Hold with a $0.42 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Elite Pharmaceuticals stock, see the ELTP Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on ELTP Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ELTP is a Outperform.

Score is driven mainly by strong financial performance (high margins, solid TTM profitability, and very low leverage) supported by a low P/E valuation and a positive recent results update. The key drag is weak technicals, with the stock trading below major moving averages and negative MACD indicating a downtrend.

To see Spark’s full report on ELTP stock, click here.

More about Elite Pharmaceuticals

Elite Pharmaceuticals, Inc. is a specialty pharmaceutical company focused on developing, manufacturing, and distributing niche generic products, particularly oral, controlled-release drug formulations. The company owns multiple generic medicines sold nationwide under the Elite Laboratories, Inc. label, licenses additional products to TAGI Pharma, and operates a cGMP and DEA-registered facility in Northvale, N.J.

Elite’s market positioning centers on serving targeted segments of the U.S. generic drug market where complex formulations and regulatory compliance are key differentiators. By combining in-house development with nationwide distribution and select licensing partnerships, the company aims to expand its portfolio of controlled-substance and pain-management generics while leveraging its specialized manufacturing capabilities.

data.title: QIMC Finds Significant Hydrocarbon and Helium Soil-Gas Anomalies at Nova Scotia Project
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Quebec Silica Resources Corp. ( (TSE:QIMC) ) has provided an announcement.

Québec Innovative Materials Corp. has reported results from a November 2025 soil-gas geochemical survey over its New Salem zone in the Cumberland Basin, Nova Scotia. The work is part of its broader push to define new hydrocarbon and helium targets within its exploration licenses in the region.

The survey identified a continuous 450-metre methane-rich anomaly within a 1.5-kilometre traverse, accompanied by elevated ethane, propane and butane levels that point to a possible thermogenic source. Helium concentrations above atmospheric background at all 28 sample stations, independently verified by GeoFrontiers using gas chromatography, bolster the case for a deeper geological source and support advancing the New Salem zone toward further geochemical, geophysical and drill-target work.

More about Quebec Silica Resources Corp.

Québec Innovative Materials Corp. is a Canadian exploration company focused on innovative resource opportunities, including hydrocarbons and related subsurface gases. The company is advancing projects in the Cumberland Basin in Nova Scotia, where it is targeting emerging exploration zones with potential thermogenic hydrocarbon and helium accumulations.

Average Trading Volume: 1,201,327

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$135.1M

Learn more about QIMC stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

Northern 3 VCT ( (GB:NTN) ) has shared an update.

Northern 3 VCT PLC has raised approximately £17.6 million through the allotment of 20,180,102 new ordinary shares as part of its 2025/26 tax-year share offer, with issue prices ranging from 88.92p to 94.38p depending on associated fees. The fundraising increases the company’s share capital to 177,825,109 ordinary shares, all carrying voting rights, and the new shares are expected to begin trading on the London Stock Exchange around 7 April 2026, clarifying the total voting rights figure for shareholder disclosure purposes.

The enlarged capital base strengthens Northern 3 VCT’s capacity to deploy funds into its target portfolio of smaller UK companies, potentially enhancing its scale and market presence within the venture capital trust sector. By confirming the updated total voting rights and affirming that no shares are held in treasury, the company also provides investors and regulators with a clear denominator for transparency and disclosure calculations under FCA rules, supporting orderly trading and governance oversight.

More about Northern 3 VCT

Northern 3 VCT PLC is a UK-listed venture capital trust that provides investors with access to a diversified portfolio of smaller, growth-oriented companies, aiming to deliver tax-efficient returns under the UK VCT regime. Its shares trade on the London Stock Exchange, and the trust is managed by Mercia Fund Management, part of Mercia Asset Management.

data.title: Gamma Resources Launches High-Resolution Survey at Utah Uranium Project
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Medallion Resources ( (TSE:GAMA) ) has shared an update.

Gamma Resources has begun a high-resolution aerial photogrammetry survey at its Green River uranium project in Utah’s San Rafael Mining District. The work will generate detailed topographic data and orthophotography to support geological mapping, structural analysis and the creation of 3D terrain models.

These datasets are expected to sharpen exploration targeting, help locate historical boreholes and improve planning for future drilling and field programs. The initiative underscores Gamma’s systematic approach to advancing its U.S. uranium portfolio and complements ongoing drilling preparation efforts at its Mesa Arc Project in New Mexico.

By deepening its technical understanding of Green River, located near other uranium projects in a historically productive district, Gamma seeks to strengthen its positioning in a U.S. uranium sector benefiting from supportive nuclear energy policies. The survey could enhance the company’s ability to delineate resources and potentially accelerate project advancement, with implications for investors and regional supply outlooks.

More about Medallion Resources

Gamma Resources Ltd. is a U.S.-focused uranium exploration and development company targeting high-quality assets in the Mountain West region. Its portfolio includes the Green River Project in Utah, near established uranium operations, and the Mesa Arc Project in New Mexico, which covers historic uranium resources in the Chama Basin.

The company aims to capitalize on growing policy and market support for nuclear energy by advancing responsibly sourced, domestically produced uranium supply. Gamma’s shares trade on the TSX Venture Exchange, the OTCQB market in the U.S., and the Frankfurt Stock Exchange, broadening its access to international investors.

Average Trading Volume: 79,732

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: C$3.44M

data.title: First Majestic to Spend $75 Million in 2026 to Restart Jerritt Canyon Gold Mine by Late 2027
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

First Majestic Silver ( (TSE:AG) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On April 2, 2026, First Majestic Silver announced a detailed restart plan for its 100%-owned Jerritt Canyon Gold Mine in Nevada, which has been on care and maintenance since March 2023. The company aims to resume gold production in the second half of 2027, underpinned by a newly expanded mineral resource base totaling 4.1 million ounces of measured and indicated gold and 3.7 million ounces of inferred resources as of December 31, 2025.

First Majestic plans to invest $75 million in 2026 to rehabilitate underground operations, advance open-pit potential, upgrade the processing plant, expand drilling and bolster staffing, supported by a pre-feasibility study from Stantec due in Q4 2026. The restart strategy, which follows the completed integration of Gatos Silver, is intended to optimize long-term, low-cost production in a strong gold price environment and could enhance the company’s growth profile and value proposition for investors if execution and market conditions align.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:AG) stock is a Buy with a C$33.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on First Majestic Silver stock, see the TSE:AG Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on AG Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, AG is a Outperform.

The score is driven primarily by improved 2025 financial performance and a constructive earnings-call outlook (strong cash, free-cash-flow momentum, and growth plans). Offsetting factors are a weaker near-term technical picture and a demanding P/E despite the high dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on AG stock, click here.

More about First Majestic Silver

First Majestic Silver Corp. is a precious metals producer focused on silver and gold, with listings in New York, Toronto and Frankfurt. The company owns the Jerritt Canyon Gold Mine in Nevada, a fully permitted operation with one of the few roasting gold processing plants in the state and a large, largely underexplored land package hosting significant measured, indicated and inferred gold resources.

data.description:

Sichuan Expressway Co ( (HK:0107) ) has provided an announcement.

Sichuan Expressway Company Limited has announced the current composition of its board of directors, detailing the roles of executive, non-executive, independent non-executive and an employee director, with Chairman Luo Zuyi and Vice Chairmen You Zhiming and Yang Shaojun among the key figures. The company also confirmed the structure of four core board committees—Audit, Strategy and Sustainable Development, Nomination, and Remuneration and Appraisal—clarifying leadership and membership in a move that enhances transparency around its corporate governance framework for shareholders and regulators.

Executive director and company secretary Yao Jiancheng formally issued the updated list from Chengdu on 2 April 2026, underscoring the company’s emphasis on clearly delineated oversight responsibilities as it manages its expressway operations. The announcement signals continuity and structure in board oversight, which is likely to support stakeholder confidence in the company’s risk management, strategic planning and remuneration policies as it operates within China’s regulated transport infrastructure market.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:0107) stock is a Hold with a HK$5.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Sichuan Expressway Co stock, see the HK:0107 Stock Forecast page.

More about Sichuan Expressway Co

Sichuan Expressway Company Limited is a PRC-based operator in the transportation infrastructure sector, focused on the investment, construction, operation and management of expressways in Sichuan Province. The company is listed in Hong Kong and is overseen by a board comprising executive, non-executive, independent non-executive and employee directors, reflecting a diversified governance structure aligned with listed company standards.
